hero.name: Javier Botella
hero.description: Backend and Android with real production experience. I build REST APIs, native mobile apps and the infrastructure that supports them.

about.title: About
about.p1: I've been working in real environments for a while: production systems, critical migrations, government service integrations and apps that real people use. I don't just make code work — I care about understanding why it works and what happens when it doesn't.
about.p2: My differentiator is the full cycle: I can write the API, containerize the application, configure observability and deploy with CI/CD. That gives context to every technical decision.
about.status: CFGS DAW · IES Politécnico Jesús Marín

items: Audit, statistics, roles and users modules for a Laravel API documented with Swagger
RabbitMQ queue system (Python/PHP): priorities, automatic retries and unit tests for bulk SMS sending
PHP app containerization with Nginx Proxy Manager and SQL Server, orchestrated with Docker Compose
Jenkins deployment in Docker as CI/CD engine with private image registry
Centralized log platform with ELK Stack + Filebeat and integration of government service SCSP_WS
Maintenance of production Android attendance app alongside RESTful APIs in Quarkus
Full design and development of Ansible ecosystem for automated hardening of Windows, CentOS and Rocky Linux servers
Wazuh (SCA) audit for ENS 2022 and ISO 27001/22 compliance with Zabbix and Elasticsearch monitoring
Internal automation with Python: Bitbucket branch cleanup, PR authorship validation, Elasticsearch index management
CI/CD pipeline maintenance in Bitbucket and active participation in ENS 2022 and ISO 27001/22 certification audits
Full CRUD with JSF and PrimeFaces for internal management with filters, sorting and Excel export
Android apps with MVVM architecture (Java and Kotlin), SQLite persistence and REST API consumption
Configuration and certification of FreePBX/PBXAct PBXs and VoIP terminals
Automated maintenance script with Ansible, PHP and Bash; fixed FOP2/TreeMT integration bug by migrating from Perl to PHP

items.name: TheMechanic
items.subtitle: REST API + Android App
items.description: Complete garage management system. Spring Boot 4 backend with feature-based architecture, JWT with roles, PostgreSQL, Flyway and OpenAPI. Native Android client in Kotlin with Jetpack Compose, Clean Architecture + MVVM, Hilt and Retrofit.

items.name: Laravel API Blueprint
items.subtitle: Reference RESTful API
items.description: Laravel API template with JWT authentication, user management and role-based permissions, action auditing, usage statistics and Swagger documentation. Dockerized and designed as a migration guide from Slim PHP.

items.name: RabbitMQ SMS System
items.subtitle: Queue-based delivery control
items.description: SMS control system with RabbitMQ and delayed exchange in Python. User-differentiated queues with configurable time windows, redundant event discarding and MySQL persistence.

items.name: Docker ELK Secure
items.subtitle: Observability stack
items.description: ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) in Docker with free basic license and security optimized for local development. Base of the observability stack used in production.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk
contact.description: Open to opportunities, collaborations or just talking tech.

footer.built: Built with HTML, CSS and JS · No frameworks
